case_title: HENDERSON, PATRICIA S. vs. THE GENEVA AVE. UNITED METHODIST CHURCH

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HENDERSON, PATRICIA S. AS TO DEFENDANT THE GENEVA AVE. UNITED METHODIST CHURCH

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HENDERSON, PATRICIA S. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE GENEVA AVE. UNITED METHODIST CHURCH $1,183.68 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,263.68
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF HENDERSON, PATRICIA S.
